summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Product Variants & Packs feature (Phase B2). Backend: 30/30 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/products/{id} returns variants array with packs
Backend: POST /api/producer/products/{id}/variants - Create variant requires auth
Backend: POST /api/producer/products/{id}/variants - Create variant requires producer role
Backend: POST /api/producer/products/{id}/variants - Create variant success
Backend: POST /api/producer/products/{id}/variants - Returns 404 for non-existent product
Backend: PUT /api/producer/products/{id}/variants/{variant_id} - Update variant success
Backend: PUT /api/producer/products/{id}/variants/{variant_id} - Returns 404 for non-existent variant
Backend: DELETE /api/producer/products/{id}/variants/{variant_id} - Delete variant success
Backend: DELETE /api/producer/products/{id}/variants/{variant_id} - Returns 404 for non-existent variant
Backend: POST /api/producer/products/{id}/packs - Create pack success
Backend: POST /api/producer/products/{id}/packs - Create pack requires auth
Backend: POST /api/producer/products/{id}/packs - Returns 404 for non-existent variant
Backend: POST /api/producer/products/{id}/packs - Rejects negative price
Backend: POST /api/producer/products/{id}/packs - Rejects negative stock
Backend: PUT /api/producer/products/{id}/packs/{pack_id} - Update pack success
Backend: PUT /api/producer/products/{id}/packs/{pack_id} - Returns 404 for non-existent pack
Backend: DELETE /api/producer/products/{id}/packs/{pack_id} - Delete pack success
Backend: DELETE /api/producer/products/{id}/packs/{pack_id} - Returns 404 for non-existent pack
Backend: POST /api/cart/add with variant_id and pack_id - Success
Backend: GET /api/cart returns variant_name, pack_label, pack_units
Backend: POST /api/cart/add without variant_id for variant product - Returns 400
Backend: POST /api/cart/add without pack_id for variant with packs - Returns 400
Backend: POST /api/cart/add with invalid variant_id - Returns 404
Backend: POST /api/cart/add with invalid pack_id - Returns 404
Backend: DELETE /api/cart/{product_id} with variant_id and pack_id - Success
Backend: Checkout validates pack stock levels
Backend: Product returns complete variant structure with all fields
Backend: Pack prices are correctly returned
Backend: Pack savings can be calculated from data
Frontend: Product detail page shows variant selector when product has variants
Frontend: Product detail page shows pack selector with prices and savings
Frontend: Price updates dynamically when variant is selected ($24.99 -> $34.99)
Frontend: Pack options change when variant is switched
Frontend: Savings displayed correctly (Pack of 6: Save $14.99, Pack of 12: Save $49.98)
Frontend: Add to cart works with variant and pack selection
Frontend: Toast notification shows 'Added 1 item(s) to cart!'
Frontend: Cart displays variant and pack info (Original · Pack of 6)
Frontend: Cart shows correct pack price ($134.95)
Frontend: Producer products table shows variant count (2 var / 5 packs)
Frontend: VariantPackManager modal opens correctly
Frontend: VariantPackManager shows all variants with SKUs
Frontend: VariantPackManager shows all packs with price, units, stock
Frontend: VariantPackManager has Add Pack and Add Another Variant buttons
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_variants_packs_api.py - Created comprehensive test suite for variants & packs feature
seed_data_creation: Used existing test product: prod_7889643617d1 (Premium Extra Virgin Olive Oil) with 2 variants (Original, Extra Virgin Gold) and 5 packs total.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product Variants & Packs feature (Phase B2) fully implemented and tested. Key files: server.py (backend endpoints lines 2434-2645), ProductDetailPage.js (variant/pack selectors), VariantPackManager.js (producer management modal), CartContext.js (updated cart functions). Test product 'prod_7889643617d1' has 2 variants: 'Original' (var_99aa8803) with 3 packs and 'Extra Virgin Gold' (var_1afea6a5) with 2 packs. Producer account 'producer@test.com' owns this product.

variant_crud.details: Create, update, delete variants via /api/producer/products/{id}/variants endpoints

pack_crud.details: Create, update, delete packs via /api/producer/products/{id}/packs endpoints

cart_with_variants.details: Cart add/remove with variant_id and pack_id, cart items include variant_name, pack_label, pack_units

checkout_stock_validation.details: Checkout validates pack stock levels for products with variants

frontend_variant_selector.details: Product detail page shows variant buttons, price updates on selection

frontend_pack_selector.details: Pack selector shows prices and savings, updates when variant changes

frontend_cart_display.details: Cart shows variant and pack info (e.g., 'Original · Pack of 6')

producer_variant_manager.details: VariantPackManager modal allows producer to manage variants and packs
